title: FAPO Turbo Manifold for Honda Civic Acura Integra B16 B18 DOHC VTEC T3 38mm WG
description:
Item Specifics:

  • Mounting Style: Bolt-On
  • Turbo Fitment: T3, T3/T4 Hybrid
  • Fitment Type: Performance/Custom
  • Manufacturer Part Number: FE605320
  • Mounting Hardware Included: Yes
  • Material: 304 Stainless Steel
  • Runner Diameter: 1-3/4 in. (45mm)
  • Placement on Vehicle: Front
  • Brand: FAPO
  • Head Flange Thickness: 1/2 in. (13.5mm)
  • Wastegate Fitment: 35/38mm (2-bolt)
  • Type: Tubular Turbo Manifold
  • Turbo Mount Position: Low/Bottom Mount
  • Pipe Thickness: Schedule 40 (3mm)
  • Surface Finish: Sandblasted
  • Manufacturer Warranty: 1 Year

Application:

  • 1990-2001 Acura Integra with 1.8L B18 DOHC VTEC
  • 1999-2000 Honda Civic Si/EX-R SIR Coupe with 1.6L B16 DOHC VTEC
  • 1994-1997 Honda Civic del Sol VTEC Coupe with 1.6L B16 DOHC VTEC
  • For B16/B18 DOHC VTEC motors only
  • Not compatible with stock A/C and P/S

Features:

  • Fits T3 or T3/T4 hybrid turbo
  • Excellent quality and durability to improve vehicle performance
  • Tubular manifold design for better exhaust flow and more top-end power
  • Equal length runners for balanced exhaust reversion and enhanced turbo performance
  • Precision aligned tubes made of Schedule 40 cast 304 stainless steel
  • Head flanges laser-cut from high-quality 1/2-inch thick steel plates
  • Flange is flattened by a hydraulic press for precise and leak-free sealing
  • All joints are golden color TIG brass style welded to prevent cracking and wear
  • Flanges chrome plated for corrosion resistance
  • Sandblasted surface for extra hardness
  • Accessories in the photos are included
  • 1-year warranty for any manufacturing defect
  • No instructions provided; professional install recommended
  • All products are in the United States and shipped from the nearest warehouse

Technical Specifications:

  • Manifold Type: Tubular Turbo Manifold
  • Runner Diameter: 1-3/4 in. (45mm)
  • Runner Layout: Equal Length
  • Turbo Fitment: T3, T3/T4 Hybrid
  • Turbo Mount Position: Low/Bottom Mount
  • Wastegate Fitment: 35/38mm (2-bolt)
  • Head Flange Thickness: 1/2 in. (13.5mm)
  • Pipe Thickness: Schedule 40 (3mm)
  • Material: 304 Stainless Steel
  • Finish: Sandblasted

Warranty:

All items carry a standard 1-year warranty from the date of purchase. Proof of purchase is required. Please provide your order number, and submit images or videos to speed up the warranty claim process. The defective items generally do not need to be returned unless requested for further inspection.
